sources.title: A new predictive equation for resting energy expenditure in healthy individuals
sources.reference: American Journal of Clinical Nutrition; PubMed 2305711

sources.title: Distance-based active walking estimate
sources.limitations: Engineering estimate; not an individual physiological constant.

sources.title: Body composition energy-change candidate
sources.limitations: Activation threshold and blending are stalled; production falls back to weight-only.

activityFallbackPolicy.rule: Recorded steps and recorded completed workouts always win independently. Only a missing component receives its profile fallback.

statuses.unavailable: no actual data and fallback disabled or unavailable

dailyStepGoal.rule: The user-selected daily step goal is used only as the step fallback when recorded daily steps are missing.

workoutCaloriesContract.rule: For each completed workout, the day consumes the non-negative calorie value exposed by the workout. The nutrition target engine does not derive workout calories from exercise details.
workoutCaloriesContract.fallback: A profile-level workout fallback may be used only when no completed workout value is available for the day.
workoutCaloriesContract.scope: Workout calorie-model design and correction factors are outside 0.1.0_01_theo.
